title: Samurai Town Story Part I
actors: Kômei Minami, Jûrô Tanizaki, Tôichirô Negishi
plot: Chambara (sword fighting film) about four ronins trying to save the woman they love kidnapped by the notorious Hatamoto. 8 minutes of fragments of "Ronin Street Episode 1: Beautiful Prey" were discovered and released in 2009.
